caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey, spiky hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and a gold watch on his left wrist. To his left is a professional black microphone. The background is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white shelving unit. On-screen text includes the logos "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". In the initial frames, the man looks forward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he raises both hands to his head, gripping the headphones and placing his palms against his temples while looking downward. The setting and objects remain static throughout the clip, with the only movement being the man's physical gesture of touching his head.
